options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -allow_layer_change
options.description: Specifies if turning on layer change feature

options.name: -auto_pairing_file
options.description: Specifies the output file name to dump out fcroute auto pairing information for bump to I/O connection

options.name: -bump_use_oct_shape
options.description: fcroute use circumferential octagon to replace the complex pin shape

options.name: -check_bump_access_directions
options.description: {true|false} Specifies whether check the special bump access directions

options.name: -compaction
options.description: Specifies if turning on compaction routing

options.name: -connectPowerCellToBump
options.description: Connects all power bumps to the I/O cell pin. It does not connect to a power or ground stripe or ring

options.name: -constraintFile
options.description: Specifies the file that contains constraints for flip chip routing

options.name: -drop_via_on_all_geometries
options.description: {true|false} fcroute drop via on all geometries

options.name: -drop_via_on_power_mesh
options.description: Specifies the metal layer by layer number or layer name that the software can use to drop via

options.name: -extraConfig
options.description: Specifies the name of an extra configuration file for flip chip routing

options.name: -finger_direction
options.description: Specifies main expansion direction for finger routing

options.name: -finger_max_width
options.description: Specifies the max routing width for one wire segment

options.name: -finger_min_width
options.description: Specifies the min routing width for one wire segment

options.name: -finger_target_mesh_layer_range
options.description: {topLayer [bottomLayer]} Target mesh layer range for finger routing

options.name: -honor_bump_connect_target_constraint
options.description: {true|false} Specifies if enabling port numbering routing

options.name: -ignore_pad_type_check
options.description: Specifies if supporting CLASS PAD cells in flipchip flow

options.name: -layerChangeBotLayer
options.description: Specifies the bottom-most metal layer by layer number or layer name that the software can use when routing bumps

options.name: -layerChangeTopLayer
options.description: Specifies the top-most metal layer by layer number or layer name that the software can use when routing bumps

options.name: -lower_layer_prevent_45_routing
options.description: {true|false} Specifies if preventing 45-degree routing for lower layer

options.name: -lower_layer_route_width
options.description: Specifies the different value for lower routing layer

options.name: -merge_nearby_pin
options.description: Merge pins which are close but not touched

options.name: -multi_pad_routing_style
options.description: {default|serial|star} Specifies the routing style for multi-pads routing

options.name: -multipleConnection
options.description: {multiPadsToBump|multiBumpsToPad|default} Specifies routing connections between multiple pads and bumps. Default is no multiple connection

options.name: -pg_mesh_direction
options.description: {default|horizontal|vertical} Specifies the main routing direction of PG mesh

options.name: -pg_mesh_main_width
options.description: Specifies the main width of PG mesh

options.name: -pg_mesh_max_width
options.description: Specifies the max width of PG mesh

options.name: -pg_mesh_width
options.description: Specify the exact width of PG mesh. One value for both horizontal and vertical width. And with two values, the first value for horizontal width and the second value for vertical width

options.name: -prevent_diagonal_wire_access_bumps
options.description: {true|false} Specifies whether use diagonal wire to access bump or not

options.name: -prevent_via_under_bump
options.description: Specifies if generating vias directly under the bump

options.name: -prevent_via_under_bump_extension
options.description: <real> specifies the spacing value around bump to avoid dropping vias

options.name: -route_bump_cluster
options.description: Route bump cluster after bump grouped

options.name: -route_pg_style
options.description: Specifies the routing pattern for fcroute power routing

options.name: -route_style
options.description: Specifies routing style

options.name: -routeWidth
options.description: Specifies routing width

options.name: -via_abut_bump
options.description: via abut bump only if it is success

options.name: -wire_to_pad_honor_min_spacing
options.description: Specifies the min spacing between bump/pad with wire
